title: Replicated Sounds
description: This resource packs replaces EVERY sound in Minecraft with my voice.
body:
This resource pack replaces every sound in Minecraft with my voice. And when I say every sound...I **MEAN,** **_EVERY._** **SOUND.**

This is a project I am currently still working on.

<hr />

# Progress:

**So far, <sup>175</sup>⁄<sub>4405</sub> sounds are complete!**

**...which is basically 4% complete.**

# Finished Parts:
- Beta 0.0.1:
  - Villager
  - Pillager
  - Vindicator
  - Evoker
  - Witch
- Beta 0.0.2:
  - (almost all) Shulker
  - Item Pickup
  - UI click
  - Burp
  - Dirt, stone and grass footsteps
- Beta 0.0.3:
  - Eating
  - Drinking (honey and other liquids)
  - Zombie
  - Brewing stand
  - Changed UI Click to sound more satisfying
- Beta 0.0.4:
  - Ender Dragon Sounds
  - Experience Sounds

<details>
  <summary>Frequently Asked Questions:</summary>  

  ### Why are you making this resource pack? Are you stupid?
  > Yes, I am stupid. I have been training my voice for the longest time now and I wanted to give myself an opportunity to challenge myself with a long array of sounds. Also it's funny.
  
  ### What constitutes as sound in this case?
  > Music, mob noises, UI sounds and really any auditory thing in Minecraft.

  ### Is this a mod, resource pack or datapack?
  > It's a resource pack. Become literate.

  ### When will an update come out?
  > Anytime I replace all sounds of one or multiple features, I'll release a new version. Music will not apply to this rule. I am not doing all music at the same time.

  ### Will you keep porting it to newer releases?
  > (Writing this on 29/01/26) Maybe? At the current moment, I want to finish **a** version of Minecraft before I plan on the next update.

  ### dO tHIs fEAChURe pLS!!!!
  > 1. That's not a question. 
  > 2. I have been taking suggestions from Youtube comments from my videos documenting this resource pack.

  ### Will you upload this to CurseForge?
  > Sorry, I don't know any cursed forges. Please contact your local blacksmith for help with haunted ovens.
</details>
